headline: CF Industries (CF) Is Up 8.9% After Strong Q1 Earnings Amid Ammonia Outage Constraints
summary: In early May 2026, CF Industries Holdings reported first-quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$1,986 million and net income of US$615 million, alongside ongoing share repurchases totaling 3,577,716 shares for US$293.92 million under its May 2025 buyback program. At the same time, the company flagged reduced full-year 2026 ammonia output due to a Yazoo City outage, even as tightening global nitrogen supply and higher fertilizer prices have turned CF Industries into a key beneficiary of...

headline: CF Industries Holdings (NYSE:CF) Screens Strong with High Growth Momentum and Flawless Technical Setup
summary: CF Industries (NYSE:CF) scores high on growth momentum and technical strength, with a 6/10 HGM rating and perfect 10/10 TA rating, signaling a potential breakout opportunity near $125.24.
